manual_override.reason: Deliberate owner decision (2026-06-20) to set floor=latest=latest_known=2.1.183 — support only the newest CC, renewing the 2026-06-10 strict bump (which pinned 2.1.170). This STRICT bump removes the now-dead TeamCreate/TeamDelete tools (hard-removed in CC 2.1.178) and adopts the 2.1.171-2.1.183 capability set. Continues to override the #1945 capstone freeze per explicit owner request; auto-bump policy resumes after expires. NOTE: this DELIBERATELY DEVIATES from the steady-state policy field (latest + 3 previous minors) — floor is pinned to latest+0 here. The policy field is intentionally left unchanged because cc-support-window-bump.yml reads it to recompute the floor once this override expires; the policy resumes then. (2026-06-25, #2639: latest_known advanced from 2.1.183 to 2.1.191 to clear the per-session adoption-lag nudge — floor/latest stay frozen at 2.1.183 by design (latest_known diverges from latest while the floor is frozen); all of 2.1.184-2.1.191 verified no-op for ork.) (2026-06-26: latest_known further advanced 2.1.191→2.1.193 — 2.1.192 was never published (npm jumps 191→193); 2.1.193 verified no-op for ork — all 15 changelog bullets are CC-internal auto-mode/permissions/OTEL/background-agent/UI changes, none touch ork settings, MCP config, or hooks. The OTEL `assistant_response` event is documented in doctor/version-compatibility.md.) (2026-06-30: latest_known further advanced 2.1.193→2.1.197 — floor/latest stay frozen at 2.1.183 by design. 2.1.194-2.1.197 verified no-op for ork: 2.1.195 (only published snapshot in range) is all CC-internal mouse/voice/plugin/background-agent fixes; its hyphenated-hook-matcher exact-match change does NOT affect ork — ork's hooks.json matchers are tool names + `mcp__context7__*`/`mcp__memory__*`/`mcp__*` globs, none hyphenated. Adopted alongside Sonnet 5 (claude-sonnet-5) in models.vocab.json.) (2026-07-05: latest_known further advanced 2.1.197→2.1.201 — floor/latest stay frozen at 2.1.183 by design. 2.1.198 ADOPTED: Notification agent_needs_input/agent_completed now handled by notification/sound.ts + desktop.ts; /dataviz previously adopted via visualize-plan (#2732); remaining 2.1.198 bullets no-op or doc-only. 2.1.199-2.1.201 verified no-op for ork settings/MCP/hooks — stacked-skill loading, permission-mode 'manual' alias, AskUserQuestion no-auto-continue, retry env vars: no ork surface. Full triage: docs/audits/cc-adoption-2.1.198-201-triage-2026-07-05.md.) (2026-07-07: latest_known further advanced 2.1.201→2.1.202 — floor/latest stay frozen at 2.1.183 by design. 2.1.202 triaged (18 bullets): two OTEL/doc adoptions — `workflow.run_id`/`workflow.name` OTEL attributes documented in analytics/otel-fields.md + telemetry-inspect (this is also the last unwired piece of the HQ Langfuse OTEL trigger bridge, Yonatan-HQ/platform#6631, routed there as an HQ observability track); MCP `url`-without-`type` clearer-error-message improvement documented in doctor/mcp-pinning-check.md + version-compatibility.md. Doc-only clarifications: `/review <pr>` reverted to a fast single-pass review (review-pr note updated to point deep-review users at `/code-review <level> <pr#>`), re-invoking an already-loaded skill no longer appends a duplicate copy of its instructions (auto stacked-invocation guidance relaxed), the new 'Dynamic workflow size' /config setting + the workflow unicode-quote-escape parse-corruption fix documented in chain-patterns/dynamic-workflow-patterns.md + configure/cc-version-settings.md. Remaining bullets (Ctrl+R history-search crash, /rename bg-session revert, mTLS in-place cert rotation, Remote Control unknown-command/caption-drop/permission-mode fixes, auth-login SSH hyperlink, `claude agents` crash-loop, voice-dictation retry, resume-by-name memory in many-worktree repos, installer proxy-drop retry, /workflows list layout) are CC-internal no-ops for ork. Full triage: docs/audits/cc-adoption-2.1.202-triage-2026-07-07.md.) (2026-07-08: latest_known further advanced 2.1.202→2.1.204 — floor/latest stay frozen at 2.1.183 by design. 2.1.203 (37 bullets, cc-triage filed #2784-#2788): ONE real adoption — the worktree-isolation shell-command leak (isolated subagents sometimes ran Bash/git in the parent checkout) persisted after the 2.1.154 guard through 2.1.202; three ork files over-claimed the 2.1.154 fix as complete and were corrected (doctor/version-compatibility.md, chain-patterns/worktree-agent-pattern.md, implement/manual-worktree-pattern.md). Advisory Pattern 9 note for reduced whole-task re-delegation; matrix rows for startup-warnings→/doctor+/status, LSP-disuse fix, MCP roots/list additional dirs. #2784 ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL + 9/14 issue skill-claims were keyword false positives. 2.1.204 (1 bullet, featureless): SessionStart headless hook-event streaming fix — no-op for ork, matrix row only. Full triage: docs/audits/cc-adoption-2.1.203-204-triage-2026-07-08.md.) (2026-07-10: latest_known further advanced 2.1.204→2.1.206 — floor/latest stay frozen at 2.1.183 by design. Verified via a parallel Explore ground-truth pass over 9 auto-flagged candidates (~60% false-positive as expected). 2.1.205 (25 bullets): TWO adoptions — `--json-schema` now hard-errors on an invalid schema instead of silently emitting unstructured output (noted in bare-eval/references/invocation-patterns.md; the `format`-keyword acceptance is a no-op since ork's grading schemas use `format` only as a property name), and native `/doctor` becoming a full setup checkup + `/checkup` alias (matrix row; distinct from ork's `/ork:doctor` skill). 2.1.206 (28 bullets): the strongest adoption is `EnterWorktree` now confirming before entering a worktree OUTSIDE `.claude/worktrees/` — ork's entire `../<repo>-<task>` convention is outside that dir, so the confirmation is documented in implement/manual-worktree-pattern.md + chain-patterns/worktree-agent-pattern.md (raw `git worktree add` in worktree-workflow.md/worktree-setup.sh is unaffected — the prompt is tied to the EnterWorktree tool, not the shell command). Matrix rows also added for native `/doctor`'s new CLAUDE.md-trim check (complements ork's ≤4800B byte-budget hook), MCP per-server `request_timeout_ms` now honored (ork sets none today), and `/commit-push-pr` pushDefault auto-allow (ork pushes to origin only). Remaining bullets across both releases (background-agent list state, Windows worktree/crash fixes, `/model` price-display fixes — ork quotes no prices, OAuth MCP re-auth, `claude rm` roster cleanup, agents-view rendering, project verify-skill regeneration, `/code-review` opus-4-8 quality) are CC-internal no-ops for ork. Full triage: docs/audits/cc-adoption-2.1.205-206-triage-2026-07-10.md.) (2026-07-10, floor bump: explicit owner decision to RENEW the strict pin at the current head — floor=latest=latest_known=2.1.206, drop_after=2.1.205. Every version in the dropped range 2.1.184-2.1.206 was individually triaged across the adoption sweeps recorded above (see the per-range triage docs in docs/audits/); the 2.1.203 worktree shell-command leak closure and 2.1.206 EnterWorktree confirmation are now floor-guaranteed behaviors rather than known-risk windows. Synthetic release-watch fixture + integration test bumped together per the .latest coupling. The policy field stays untouched so cc-support-window-bump.yml resumes the latest+3 window when this override expires.) (2026-07-14: latest_known further advanced 2.1.206→2.1.208 — floor/latest/drop_after stay frozen at 2.1.206/2.1.206/2.1.205 by design (latest_known diverges from latest while the strict pin holds; no .latest coupling touched). 2.1.207 (BREAKING, ork verified clean): (1) plugin option values no longer read from project .claude/settings.json (user-level/--settings/managed only); (2) `${user_config.*}` in shell-form hook commands rejected (shell-injection fix). Grep-verified ZERO ork exposure — no `${user_config}` in src/hooks|manifests|settings, no project-level pluginConfigs reliance, no empty-tools[] agents. 2.1.208 (incremental, all no-op/upside): auto-mode rule compilation cached (perf win for ork's deny/ask rulesets), Agent tool empty tools[] now hard-errors, memory-leak fixes (MCP stdio stderr/LSP/async-hook-output/SDK), apiKeyHelper fail-fast (3 vs 10 retries), CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS scientific-notation parse fix. User-facing: ork users who stored plugin config in project .claude/settings.json must migrate it to ~/.claude/settings.json for CC ≥2.1.207. Full triage: docs/audits/cc-adoption-2.1.207-208-triage-2026-07-14.md.)

comment: Single source of truth for OrchestKit's CC support window. All other floor declarations (CLAUDE.md, src/hooks/src/lib/cc-version-matrix.ts MIN_CC_VERSION, manifests/ork.json) derive from this via scripts/stamp-cc-support.mjs. `latest_known` (the highest CC version ork's adoption covers — distinct from `latest`, the support-window head; they diverge while a manual_override freezes the floor) stamps LATEST_KNOWN_CC, the version-check adoption-nudge threshold. Updated by .github/workflows/cc-support-window-bump.yml.
